arts.ttl: Four Observations from Bayern Munich’s weird 3-0 win over Werder Bremen
arts.sum: Bayern Munich thought they were going nowhere against Werder Bremen, but thanks to a brace of Harry Kane penalties and a Leroy Sané tap-in the three points went to the former. Anyone who says this will sound like a broken record, but it’s undeniably true: opposition teams put 10 players behind the ball and spring counters and that’s all it takes to stop Bayern’s threat.

arts.ttl: Bavarian Podcast Works — Postgame Show: Bayern Munich 3-0 Werder Bremen (Bundesliga)
arts.sum: Bayern Munich got the three points it needed in a 3-0 win over Werder Bremen, but it was not necessarily an aesthetic showing for the Bavarians. Bayern Munich got the three points it needed...

arts.ttl: PLAYER RATINGS | Bayern Munich 3-0 Werder Bremen
arts.sum: Bayern Munich comfortably beat Werder Bremen 3-0 to extend their lead at the top of the Bundesliga table, temporarily, to nine points. A forgettable first 45 as Bayern were expectantly…

arts.ttl: Harry Kane's double seals comfortable Bayern Munich win over Werder Bremen
arts.sum: Harry Kane scored two penalties as Bayern Munich cruised to a 3-0 victory over Werder Bremen in the Matchday 21 curtain-raiser. Michael Zetterer in the Bremen goal was largely untroubled, with Kane's header just before half-time the closest either side came to breaking the deadlock.
Werder Bremen failed to register a single shot on target as a dominant Bayern Munich side ran out 3-0 winners at the Allianz Arena.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich vs Werder Bremen: Gamethread and Live Blog — Lineups are out! Sacha Boey gets the nod at right back
arts.sum: It feels unlikely that Bayern will repeat the inconceivable act of conceding three unanswered goals in the second half. While you’re waiting for the game, why not check out our preview podcast?

arts.ttl: Robert Lewandowski recalls scoring five goals in nine minutes for Bayern Munich
arts.sum: “I knew I’d scored the goals, but Thomas Muller pushed me to the fans after the game and I was like, ‘Why?’ OK, we won and I scored the goals, but I didn’t think I’d done something historic,” Lewandowski shared in the interview. The FC Barcelona man reminisced about his legendary day in a Bayern Munich shirt recently in an interview with FourFourTwo.

arts.ttl: Tottenham lineup vs. Aston Villa: Predicted XI for FA Cup clash as Mathys Tel, Mikey Moore calls made
arts.sum: Sports Mole takes an in-depth look at how Tottenham Hotspur could line up for Sunday's FA Cup fourth-round clash with Aston Villa.

arts.ttl: Rodgers delight as Celtic fans allowed to travel for Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers is delighted Celtic fans can travel to Bayern Munich to "drive the team on" in the Champions League after admitting the threat of an away supporters ban had been a "big worry".

arts.ttl: Marco Friedl wouldn’t say no to Bayern Munich again
arts.sum: Former Bayern Munich youth player Marco Friedl would not mind the opportunity to return to his childhood club one day. The SV Werder Bremen defender spent his youth days at the Bayern campus.
